---
title: "Strategic Interactions in Foreign Aid Games - Pousse, Pereira, Sharma (2024)"
---

As part of [Emeric Henry](https://sites.google.com/site/emericmlhenry/home)'s second semester Microeconomics class on Game Theory, students are required to co-write a paper on a related topic of choice.

Myself, as well as classmates Rodrigo Pereira and Vivan Sharma, chose to study strategic interactions in foreign aid.  

Please find below:

- [Strategic Interactions in Foreign Aid Games - Pousse, Pereira, Sharma (2024)](docs/site_libs/PDFs/Micro2_paper_file/Micro II Group Paper (copy) - Pousse, Pereira, Sharma .pdf)
  
- [The Latex code]()

This paper received the grade of 15.5/20.
